statement.en: Constructing law and economics : legal thought, social struggle, and the reproduction of American capitalism, 1945-1980
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is a thesis with embargoed abstract content. No substantive claim, axiom, or proposition is available for evaluation. The work exists as a placeholder with deferred access to its actual intellectual content. Truth-value assessment is observation-impossible until embargo lifts.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 法と資本が社会的闘争を分母として秩序を再生産する、その必然性が見える。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='30' r='12' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><circle cx='30' cy='70' r='12' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><circle cx='70' cy='70' r='12' stroke='#ec4899' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><path d='M 50 42 L 30 58' stroke='#f59e0b' stroke-width='1.5'/><path d='M 50 42 L 70 58' stroke='#f59e0b' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='30' y1='82' x2='70' y2='82' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='2'/></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 上の一点（法と資本の思想）が二つの基盤（対立する社会勢力）へ分岐し、底部の線へ収束される —支配秩序の再生産。
